# #10197/#10203 — on-device BACKEND-loss crash recovery (host agent killed mid-session)
# Distinct from #10397 (on-device agent restart): injects a backend crash + asserts the app survives + reconnects.

1. before crash: app pid 8546, agent healthy (agentState=running), chat working.
2. CRASH INJECTED: killed the host agent process -> /api/health unreachable from the app.
3. during outage: app pid STILL 8546 -> the app did NOT crash when its backend died.
4. RESTART: host agent restarted, recovered healthy at t+15s.
5. recovery: app reaches recovered agent: running ; app pid still 8546 (constant across the whole crash+recovery cycle).

RESULT: a backend (agent) crash does NOT take down the on-device app; the app process survives
        the entire outage and the agent connection recovers when the backend returns.
